name: Super Saiyan Goku
description:
Son Goku, born Kakarot, is the main protagonist of the Dragon Ball manga series created by Akira Toriyama. Goku is a Saiyan originally sent to conquer Earth as an infant, but suffered a severe head injury that erased his memory, causing him to grow up pure-hearted and kind under the care of his adopted grandfather, Grandpa Gohan. As he grew older, Goku trained in martial arts under Master Roshi alongside Bulma, Krillin, and others. Goku's incredible strength, bravery, and love for a challenge led him to participate in the World Martial Arts Tournament and later face increasingly powerful foes like the Red Ribbon Army, Piccolo, and the alien tyrant Frieza.
